title: landolphia senensis
intro: Landolphia senensis, also known as African yew or African bitter yam, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its woody stem and yellowish-green flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Landolphia senensis include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential in lowering blood pressure and improving digestive health. Landolphia senensis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and its extracts have also been used in the production of traditional remedies and pharmaceutical products.
